name: hand_start_id
description: Unique identifier for this hand start row, formatted as {hand_setup_id}_001. Primary key.

name: hand_setup_id
description: Parent hand setup identifier. Foreign key to hand_setups.hand_setup_id.

name: clip_id
description: Denormalized parent clip identifier. Equals hand_setups.clip_id for this hand setup; stored to avoid joins on common queries.

name: video_id
description: Denormalized parent video identifier. Equals hand_setups.video_id for this hand setup; stored to avoid joins on common queries.

name: fva_time_seconds
description: Offset from start of source video (not from start of clip) of the first voluntary action (FVA), in whole seconds.

name: second_action_time_seconds
description: Offset from start of source video of the second action following the FVA, in whole seconds.

name: hand_start_state
description: Observed state at hand start. Structure: {hand_setup: {...same shape as hand_setups.hand_setup_state}, fva: {seat_position_label: string, seat_number: int, action_type: string, bet_amount: number|null}}. Outer wrapper from raw LLM response is stripped before storage.

name: fva_frame_gcs_path
description: Full gs://... URI to the high-resolution frame extracted at fva_time_seconds.

name: verify_frame_gcs_paths
description: Full gs://... URIs to frames extracted shortly after second_action_time_seconds, used to visually verify the detected FVA/second-action timing.

name: detected_at
description: Timestamp when this hand start row was written. Auto-populated on insert via DEFAULT.
